data.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation complete. ruff format/check: all checks passed. tests/scripts/test_acli_integration.py: 21 passed. tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound_link.py: 8 passed, 11 pre-existing RED (bridge-outbound LINK/UNLINK handler not yet implemented — unrelated to this task). get_issue_links method exists and passes grep acceptance check. ✓
